explanations.2: CONTAINER_PREFIX is a name prefix used to identify Docker containers belonging to this Joomla setup, so multiple projects won't conflict.
explanations.11: JOOMLA_SITE_NAME is the display name for your Joomla website that appears in the browser and admin panel.
explanations.13: JOOMLA_VERSION specifies which Joomla release to install, along with the PHP version and web server it needs.
explanations.15: MYSQL_PORT is the network port where the database server listens; it's set to 3301 instead of the default 3306 to avoid conflicts if another MySQL is running.
explanations.17: MYSQL_VERSION specifies which MySQL release to use, since different versions have different features and performance.
explanations.19: PROJECT_NAME is a general identifier for this entire project setup, used by Docker Compose to organize related containers and volumes.
explanations.21: WEB_PORT is the port number you'll use in your browser URL to access the website, like http://localhost:8081.
